data.content: Implementation complete on branch worktree-knots-87bd-immutable-metadata (commit d077b43). All 6 work packages implemented: (1) LeaseReference type and ImmutableRecord trait in domain layer, (2) append-only enforcement via ensure_append_only_records guard, (3) lease_ref wired through all creation paths for notes/handoffs/steps, (4) backward-compatible serde with supersedes_id pattern replacing in-place step mutation, (5) lease_ref and supersedes_id stripped from CLI/JSON output, (6) integration tests in tests/cli_dispatch_metadata.rs. make sanity passes: 865 tests green, 95.12% coverage.
